f2p_added: converts BMP to PNG on Wayland/WSLg
notes: PR #1112 BMP→PNG clipboard conversion for WSL2/WSLg. Canonical patch adds packages/coding-agent/test/clipboard-image-bmp-conversion.test.ts (new file, 88 lines, single behavioral test) AND rewrites packages/coding-agent/test/clipboard-image.test.ts to also include `it('converts BMP to PNG on Wayland/WSLg', ...)`. Both `it()` blocks share the same description so vitest verbose emits a single key under that name; FAIL_TO_PASS=[that name]. Test asserts: (1) hands a fake BMP via mocked wl-paste, (2) result.mimeType === 'image/png', (3) PNG magic-byte prefix [0x89, 0x50, 0x4e, 0x47]. Pure behavioral — implementation-agnostic (any photon/imagemagick/pure-JS BMP-to-PNG converter passes). _fidelity: exact, no warnings.
